violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
Molluscan Shellfish tags did not have all of the required information. Date of last item sold/discarded was lacking on several tags. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

3-door low boy was observed holding ambient temperature 0f 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per interview of PIC, unit was recently restocked/open to fill prep unit. Temperature was adjusted to maintain an ambient temperature of 41 degrees or colder. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
Chemicals were stored on the same shelf with food/equipment/single service articles in the basement prep area Bottle was moved from shelving. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Working containers of dry and liquid ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Several ceiling times were observed missing in the basement prep area. Per PIC, establishment had repair work performed recently; technician is scheduled to finalize work and replace tiles. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
